sp_widget.name: CircleBack Return Form
sp_widget.template:
Return Request Submitted

Your reference number is:

{{c.data.returnRef}}

{{c.data.message}}
Please check your email for shipping instructions.

Submission Failed — {{c.data.message}}

Return Your Device

Return your old device. We will handle the rest.

{{c.errors.consumer_name}}
{{c.errors.consumer_email}}
{{c.errors.device_type}}
{{c.errors.device_condition}}
{{c.errors.device_model}}
{{c.errors.postal_address}}
{{c.errors.agreement}}
